mermaidSyntax:
graph LR subgraph Screening["Screening Period
Weeks -4 to 0"] A[Informed Consent
Week -4] --> B[Eligibility Assessment] B --> C[Baseline Measurements] end subgraph Treatment["Treatment Period
Weeks 0-52"] C --> D{Randomization
Week 0} D -->|Treatment Arm| E[Drug X 10mg Daily] D -->|Control Arm| F[Placebo] E --> G[Follow-up Visits
Weeks 4, 12, 26] F --> G G --> H[Primary Endpoint
Week 52] end subgraph Extension["Extension Period
Weeks 52-104"] H --> I[Optional Open-Label] I --> J[Safety Follow-up
Week 56] end style D fill:#f59e0b,stroke:#d97706,color:#000 style E fill:#3b82f6,stroke:#1e40af,color:#fff style F fill:#ef4444,stroke:#b91c1c,color:#fff style I fill:#6b7280,stroke:#4b5563,color:#fff,stroke-dasharray: 5 5
